## Checklist
- [ ] Code files ≤ 250 words (350 hard cap); docs exempt
- [ ] No new dependency that a few lines could replace
- [ ] Self-check passes (hooks: `--test`; skills: example included)
- [ ] No polling introduced anywhere
- [ ] Core stays runtime-read-only (changes flow through overlays/db where applicable)
